title: Shrimp and Feijoada German-Style Schnitzel
description: A German-inspired twist on the classic schnitzel, featuring shrimp and feijoada in a crispy garlicky crust.
instructions: 1. Prepare the shrimp by peeling and de-veining.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, salt, and pepper.
3. In another shallow dish, beat the eggs.
4. In a third shallow dish, mix together garlicky breadcrumbs and crumbly cheese.
5. Dip each shrimp into the flour mixture, then the eggs, and finally the breadcrumb mixture, pressing the coating onto the shrimp.
6. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat with a small amount of oil.
7. Add the coated shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Serve immediately with your favorite sides, such as sauerkraut or braised red cabbage.
